issues: Indentation errors in compute_signal method causing logic to be unreachable or incorrect.
Code does not handle signal_confidence or insider_role weighting in position sizing as per spec.
Position sizing is fixed 0.20/len(universe) rather than based on transaction size and insider role as required.

Signal logic returns RISK_OFF on any sell transaction regardless of buy presence, which may prematurely exit; spec intent is to buy on large buys and sell on large sells, but code prioritizes sell over buy without considering multiple signals.
No evidence of using adapter output columns correctly due to indentation and filtering issues.
